title: Forbelean Defense
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Forbelean Defense''',<ref name="FHI">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''</ref> also called '''forbelean defense''',<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|285|forbelean defense}}</ref> was a martial arts posture from the [[Forbelea system/Legends|Forbelea system]] created by the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The defense required the user to maintain a posture that would allow all attacks to be intercepted and deflected.<ref name="FHI" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}}
